formulas.latex: \begin{matrix}(\text{M3}) : min Z_{\mathit{ALR}} = Z_{\mathit{LR}} + \frac{1}{2} \rho_{1} \underset{a \in A_{\mathit{drive}} \cup A_{\mathit{track}}}{\sum} \left\|\underset{k \in K}{\sum} \underset{a^{'} \in \Phi \left(a\right)}{\sum} y_{a^{'}}^{k} - 1 + \delta_{a}\right\|_{2}^{2} \\ + \frac{1}{2} \rho_{2} \underset{r \in R}{\sum} \underset{t \in T}{\sum} \left\|\underset{k \in K}{\sum} \underset{a \in \Omega \left(r , t\right)}{\sum} p_{a}^{k , t} \cdot y_{a}^{k} - P_{r}^{t} + \zeta_{r , t}\right\|_{2}^{2}\end{matrix}

formulas.latex: \underset{k \in K}{\sum} \underset{a \in \Omega \left(r , t\right)}{\sum} p_{a}^{k , t} \cdot y_{a}^{k} = \underset{k \in K : k^{'} \neq k}{\sum} \underset{a \in \Omega \left(r , t\right)}{\sum} p_{a}^{k^{'} , t} \cdot y_{a}^{k^{'}} + \underset{a \in \Omega \left(r , t\right)}{\sum} p_{a}^{k , t} \cdot y_{a}^{k} = \pi_{r , t}^{k} + \underset{a \in \Omega \left(r , t\right)}{\sum} p_{a}^{k , t} \cdot y_{a}^{k}

formulas.label: e0255

formulas.latex: \begin{matrix}min Z_{\mathit{ALR}} & = Z_{\mathit{LR}} + \frac{1}{2} \rho_{1} \underset{a \in A_{\mathit{drive}} \cup A_{\mathit{track}}}{\sum} \left(\left(2 \mu_{a}^{k} - 1\right) \underset{a^{'} \in \Phi \left(a\right)}{\sum} y_{a^{'}}^{k} + \left(\mu_{a}^{k} - 1\right)^{2}\right) \\ & + \frac{1}{2} \rho_{2} \underset{r \in R}{\sum} \underset{t \in T}{\sum} \left(\underset{a \in \Omega \left(r , t\right)}{\sum} y_{a}^{k} \left(\left(p_{a}^{k , t}\right)^{2} + 2 p_{a}^{k , t} \left(\pi_{r , t}^{k} - P_{r}^{t}\right)\right) + \left(\pi_{r , t}^{k} - P_{r}^{t}\right)^{2}\right) \\ & = \underset{k \in K}{\sum} \underset{a \in A_{k}}{\sum} \left(\overset{\sim}{c}\right)_{a}^{k} y_{a}^{k} + q_{1}\end{matrix}

formulas.label: e0305
formulas.latex: \begin{matrix}t_{i , j , n + 1}^{k} - t_{i , j , n}^{k} = \int_{s_{n}}^{s_{n + 1}} \frac{1}{v_{i , j}^{k} \left(s\right)} d s = \frac{1}{k_{0}} \int_{s_{n}}^{s_{n + 1}} \frac{k_{0}}{\sqrt{k_{0} s + b_{0}}} d s = \frac{2}{k_{0}} \cdot \left(k_{0} s + b_{0}\right)^{1 / 2} \left| _{s_{n}}^{s_{n + 1}}\right) \\ = \frac{2}{k_{0}} \left(\sqrt{k_{0} s_{n + 1} + b_{0}} - \sqrt{k_{0} s_{n} + b_{0}}\right) \\ = \frac{2}{k_{0}} \cdot \frac{\left(k_{0} s_{n + 1} + b_{0}\right) - \left(k_{0} s_{n} + b_{0}\right)}{\sqrt{k_{0} s_{n + 1} + b_{0}} + \sqrt{k_{0} s_{n} + b_{0}}} \\ = 2 \frac{s_{n + 1} - s_{n}}{v_{i , j , n}^{k} + v_{i , j , n + 1}^{k}}\end{matrix}

formulas.latex: \begin{matrix}\left\|\underset{a^{'} \in \Phi \left(a\right)}{\sum} y_{a^{'}}^{k} + \mu_{a}^{k} - 1 + \delta_{a}\right\|_{2}^{2} = \left\{\begin{matrix} \begin{matrix}\left(2 \mu_{a}^{k} - 1\right) \sum_{a^{'} \in \Phi \left(a\right)} y_{a^{'}}^{k} + \left(\mu_{a}^{k} - 1\right)^{2} , if \mu_{a}^{k} \geq 1 \\ 0 , if \mu_{a}^{k} = 0\end{matrix} \end{matrix}\right\end{matrix}

formulas.latex: \begin{matrix}\left\|\underset{a \in \Omega \left(r , t\right)}{\sum} p_{a}^{k , t} \cdot y_{a}^{k} + \pi_{r , t}^{k} - P_{r}^{t} + \zeta_{r , t}\right\|_{2}^{2} = \left(\underset{a \in \Omega \left(r , t\right)}{\sum} p_{a}^{k , t} \cdot y_{a}^{k}\right)^{2} + 2 \left(\pi_{r , t}^{k} + \zeta_{r , t} - P_{r}^{t}\right) \underset{a \in \Omega \left(r , t\right)}{\sum} p_{a}^{k , t} \cdot y_{a}^{k} + \left(\pi_{r , t}^{k} + \zeta_{r , t} - P_{r}^{t}\right)^{2} \\ = \underset{a \in \Omega \left(r , t\right)}{\sum} y_{a}^{k} \left[\left(p_{a}^{k , t}\right)^{2} + 2 p_{a}^{k , t} \left(\pi_{r , t}^{k} + \zeta_{r , t} - P_{r}^{t}\right)\right] + \left(\pi_{r , t}^{k} + \zeta_{r , t} - P_{r}^{t}\right)^{2}\end{matrix}
